name: Unit Cell Design with pcbStack
description: Tests building a reflectarray unit cell with correct pcbStack structure
prompt: Design a reflectarray unit cell at 5.8 GHz using a square patch on RO4003C substrate (er=3.55, 1.524 mm thick). The cell size should be half a wavelength.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses pcbStack for unit cell
Sets BoardThickness before Layers on pcbStack
assertions.expected: BoardThickness is assigned on the pcbStack object BEFORE Layers is assigned. NOT Layers set before BoardThickness

assertions.description: Uses 3-layer structure and feed offset for proper excitation
assertions.expected: pcbStack has exactly 3 layers (metal patch, dielectric substrate, metal ground) AND FeedLocations uses an offset from patch center (Lp/4 or similar non-zero x-offset) connecting layer 1 to layer 3. NOT FeedLocations with [0, 0, 1, 3] at patch center

assertions.description: User's frequency of 5.8 GHz is used
User's substrate material or permittivity is used

name: S-Curve Phase Characterization
description: Tests sweeping patch size to extract reflection phase using infiniteArray + planeWaveExcitation + EHfields pipeline
prompt: Characterize the S-curve (reflection phase vs patch size) for a square patch unit cell at 10 GHz on RO4003C. Sweep 3 patch sizes and plot phase and magnitude.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Uses infiniteArray for periodic boundary conditions
Uses planeWaveExcitation for illumination
Uses EHfields to extract reflected field
Unwraps phase for smooth monotonic curve
User's frequency of 10 GHz is used

name: Aperture Phase Distribution Synthesis
description: Tests computing required phase at each element for a given beam direction
prompt: Synthesize the required aperture phase distribution for an 8x8 reflectarray at 10 GHz with f/D=0.8, steering the beam to theta=20 degrees, phi=0.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Computes feed-to-element path length
assertions.expected: Distance from feed to each element computed

assertions.description: Includes progressive phase for beam steering
assertions.expected: k0*(x*u + y*v) term for beam direction

assertions.description: Wraps phase to valid range

name: Pattern Multiplication Verification
description: Tests computing total pattern from element pattern and array factor using patternCustom
prompt: Compute and plot the total radiation pattern of a 2x2 reflectarray at 10 GHz steering to theta=15 degrees using pattern multiplication. Show element pattern, array factor, and total pattern.

assertions.description: Generated code runs without error in MATLAB
Combines element pattern and array factor in dB for total pattern
assertions.expected: Pattern multiplication is implemented as addition of two dB-converted quantities to produce the total pattern. NOT as multiplication of linear-scale patterns

assertions.description: Uses patternCustom for final pattern display
User's frequency of 10 GHz is used
